caption: A short video captures scenes from a sports stadium and its entrance, featuring the Real Madrid logo in the upper right of each shot. The sequence begins with an exterior view of a stadium wall and a tall light pole beneath a cloudy sky. The perspective then shifts to an empty stadium with red tiered seating and a green grass field. A large electronic scoreboard displays "IDEAL" and a red-and-white graphic, while the words "GRANADA" and "IDEAL" are visible on the stadium walls. In the final scene, the setting moves to a covered outdoor area with red pillars and brick walls. A man in a grey tank top and dark pants walks toward a white team bus labeled "Real Madrid." He is accompanied by two men in dark suits; one stands near the bus entrance and another stands by a red pillar.
